summary: The system specification for the Norwegian OCR giro payment-collection service: record types and layouts for transaction files, and the KID (kundeidentifikasjon) rules -- a 2-25 digit customer reference whose final check digit is computed under modulus 10 (Luhn weights 2,1) or modulus 11 (weights 2-7), both applied right to left, with worked examples of both calculations.
title: Systemspesifikasjon OCR giro
